title: pelargonium × niveum
intro: Pelargonium × niveum, also known as Snow-in-Summer, is a popular, evergreen, flowering plant belonging to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat digestive issues, such as nausea, diarrhea, and indigestion, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × niveum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, often in the form of teas, infusions, or capsules, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
